import sys
import os
sys.path.append(os.getenv('PROJECT_ROOT', '/data/agent-smith'))
from tools import sop_template

data = _input.item.json.get('sop_json', {})
final_markdown = sop_template.render_sop(data)
return {"markdown": final_markdown, "processo": data.get('processo', 'SemNome')}

import sys
import os
sys.path.append(os.getenv('PROJECT_ROOT', '/data/agent-smith'))
from tools import gdrive_client, context_manager

folders = context_manager.get('config.gdrive_folders', {})
content = _input.item.json.get('markdown')
proc_name = _input.item.json.get('processo')

file_id = gdrive_client.write_document(folders.get('sops'), f"{proc_name}-v1.md", content)
return {"file_id": file_id, "proc_name": proc_name}

import sys
import os
sys.path.append(os.getenv('PROJECT_ROOT', '/data/agent-smith'))
from tools import whatsapp_client

proc_name = _input.item.json.get('proc_name')
ceo = os.getenv('CEO_WHATSAPP')
msg = f"SOP criado: {proc_name}\nSalvei no Drive para sua revisão.\nResponda OK para aprovar ou Ajusta para modificar."
whatsapp_client.send_message(ceo, msg)
return _input.item.json
